translation_mode: en-asset-is-english (en.json holds English; ja.json is identity map = JP source for title only)
title_note: title field is JP (副官はわたくしなのに！) and was translated to VI Title Case; all message fields were already English in the asset and translated JP->VI via en.json sense.

naming_conventions.Reyzeria (レイゼリア): Reyzeria (kept romanized; female knight leader, ta/ngươi)

notes: Title translated JP->VI Title Case: 副官はわたくしなのに！ -> Phó Quan Lại Là Tại Tôi Cơ À!
Speaker labels (field 1: レイゼリア/ライム/モンスター/ミレスガルド兵（男）等 and <user>) kept byte-identical per rules.
All ASCII commas inside VI text fields replaced with U+201A '‚' to preserve delimiter integrity.
SFX/onomato localized: *pant*->*Thở dốc*, *Sigh*->*Thở dài*, Gwooooooh!?->Gùùùù!? (Wendy/Upa-style spirit-cry convention not applicable; these are monster/grunt SFX cleared of residual English).
BOM + CRLF preserved from EN source; 1438 lines, 93 text records (1 title + 92 message).

Field-index build: message text field = index 2 (parts[:2] + [vi] + parts[3:]); trailing '
' suffix mirrored from source on 92 message lines, none on title.
